name: Dracotail Horn
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>星辰の裂角</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ドラゴンテイル・ホーン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 1 Attack Position monster on the field; return it to the hand/Extra Deck, then you can place 1 "Dracotail" card from your GY or banishment on the bottom of the Deck, except "Dracotail Horn", then draw 1 card. You can only activate 1 "Dracotail Horn" per turn.
eff: Target 1 Attack Position monster on the field; return it to the hand/Extra Deck, then you can place 1 "Dracotail" card from your GY or banishment on the bottom of the Deck, except "Dracotail Horn", then draw 1 card. You can only activate 1 "Dracotail Horn" per turn.

action: Returns from field to Extra Deck
Places cards from the player's Graveyard on the bottom of the Deck
Places the player's banished cards on the bottom of the Deck
